languages.text: {n}Весьма необычная цель для техножреца — в глазах служителей Омниссии человеческая жизнь редко перевешивает ценность аугментов. Что-то должно было толкнуть его на подобную стезю в прошлом.{/n}

{n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Весьма необычная цель для техножреца — в глазах служителей Омниссии человеческая жизнь редко перевешивает ценность аугментов. Что-то должно было толкнуть его на подобную стезю в прошлом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

{n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

{n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这对于一名技术神甫而言，是极为反常的目标——在欧姆尼赛亚之仆的眼中，人类生命的价值往往远低于植入物。他必然在过去经历过某种事件，才会走上这条道路。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这对于一名技术神甫而言，是极为反常的目标——在欧姆尼赛亚之仆的眼中，人类生命的价值往往远低于植入物。他必然在过去经历过某种事件，才会走上这条道路。{/n}

languages.text: {n}C'est un objectif inhabituel pour un technoprêtre. Pour les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie, la vie humaine a rarement plus de valeur que les augmentations. Un événement passé a dû l'entraîner sur cette voie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}C'est un objectif inhabituel pour un technoprêtre. Pour les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie, la vie humaine a rarement plus de valeur que les augmentations. Un événement passé a dû l'entraîner sur cette voie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es un objetivo sorprendente para un tecnosacerdote. Ante los sirvientes del Omnissiah, la vida humana rara vez supera en valor a los aumentos. Algo debe de haberle impulsado a seguir esta ruta anteriormente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es un objetivo sorprendente para un tecnosacerdote. Ante los sirvientes del Omnissiah, la vida humana rara vez supera en valor a los aumentos. Algo debe de haberle impulsado a seguir esta ruta anteriormente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir Tekno Rahip için son derece alışılmadık bir hedef... Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının gözünde insan hayatı, ogmentlerin değerinden nadiren daha ağır basar. Geçmişte bir şey onu bu yola itmiş olmalı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir Tekno Rahip için son derece alışılmadık bir hedef... Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının gözünde insan hayatı, ogmentlerin değerinden nadiren daha ağır basar. Geçmişte bir şey onu bu yola itmiş olmalı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein ausgesprochen ungewöhnliches Ziel für einen Techpriester — in den Augen der Diener des Omnissiah übersteigt das menschliche Leben nur selten den Wert von Augmentationen. Etwas muss ihn in der Vergangenheit dazu bewogen haben, diesen Weg einzuschlagen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein ausgesprochen ungewöhnliches Ziel für einen Techpriester — in den Augen der Diener des Omnissiah übersteigt das menschliche Leben nur selten den Wert von Augmentationen. Etwas muss ihn in der Vergangenheit dazu bewogen haben, diesen Weg einzuschlagen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}技術司祭にしては、きわめて異例の目標だ――オムニッシアの僕たちの目には、人間の命がオーグメティックの価値を上回ることは、めったにない。何かが、過去に彼をこの道へと駆り立てたに違いない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A highly unusual goal for a Tech-Priest — in the eyes of the servants of the Omnissiah, human life rarely outweighs the value of augments. Something must have propelled him down this path in the past.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}技術司祭にしては、きわめて異例の目標だ――オムニッシアの僕たちの目には、人間の命がオーグメティックの価値を上回ることは、めったにない。何かが、過去に彼をこの道へと駆り立てたに違いない。{/n}
